examples: Pollution control measures are either not strict or nonexistent, leading to choking clouds of smog.
Your day is ruled by minutes and seconds, but these concepts are not real in any physical sense and are nonexistent to numberless people.
Hygiene was nonexistent: no running water, no bathroom.
Hostile takeover attempts are extremely rare in Japan and shareholder activism is practically nonexistent.
In short, if monetary policy is stable and steady, inflation will remain virtually nonexistent.
